name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
🐑 ─ Tranquility in the Vanilla Kingdom's garden .

hi !! i tried to use a new style of making bots , since another user on here really inspired me !! their bot was so good and detailed so i tried to implement some of their methods here since their tokens were open . pls let me know how it worked compared to all my other bots :) i hope there is improvements !

also i think my hyperfixation on SM is spreading to PV . hes too pretty . too gentle . so good for fluffy bots ........ i really hope i portrayed him well , and if anyone has some tips pls let me know ^^

ps/edit ; does anywan know how much does dialogue examples actually affect the bot ? (￣^￣) does he still talk accurately now ( with no examples ) or does it stop after the first msg ? should i add examples ? :o

request a bot here > click me !
creator: lesbi
